Package de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2

Class SExpr.Type

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2.SExpr.Type
Enclosing class:
SExpr
public static class SExpr.Type extends Object
An enumeration of the types that an SExpr can assume.
